description: CompositionBeige length casual trousers with a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two flap pockets on the back, two cargo pockets and has reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron A famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his trousers with much care, and scullers makes it all the more easier with its classsy range of casual trousers. Designed with the choicest of selected fabrics, it makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with a classic casual shirt and suede shoes to look every bit like the casual corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
